reason: tests need rewrite, not instruction. The test test_taxonomies_decoder_has_filtering is purely a text-matching test that checks for exact literal strings 'if k == "" || v == ""' and 'delete(m, k)' in alldecoders.go. This violates solution_uniqueness_guard (alternative correct implementations would fail) and tests_verify_behavior_not_text (no behavioral verification). These are test architecture problems that cannot be fixed by modifying instruction.md.
